text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Rickey! ☆ Lucky! ☆ Happy holidays!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, nighttime at Oi Racecourse. ♪ Sometimes
it's nice to come here just for fun, instead of to
race. ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(Trainer's still off buying drinks... I think I'll just
enjoy this view by myself for now.)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(It's almost time for the Tokyo Daishoten... It'll be
held right here, after the holidays...)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(But why do I want to beat Acute and Tarumae so
badly?)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(I was able to show them the power of feng shui
just by running on equal footing with them. Am I
just being competitive? Or could it be...)

text_block_list.name: Lonely Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Sigh... The holidays only come once a year, and here I am without a special someone to spend them with... I really have no luck when it comes to love.

text_block_list.name: Lonely Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I guess I just can't compete with girls who are
blessed with cute looks or a fancy upbringing.

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe the year's already over. I wish I
could run in the Tokyo Daishoten. I wish I could
run in any race like that just once.

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
Geez, pull your head out of the clouds. Whether
you're an early bloomer or a late one, only racers
with real talent can run in events like that.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: (There are loads of different folks out there... There are so many... But all of them...)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Wait a sec! I get it now!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: That's why I felt like I had to win—why standing on the same level wasn't good enough, and I needed to surpass them.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hand her one of the drinks I bought, and we
decide to walk around the racecourse together.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Wow, it's so pretty. ☆ I had no idea Oi
Racecourse looked like this over the holidays.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
What was the event called again? The Tokyo
Mega Illumi?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's winter in Oi, and on days when races aren't
scheduled, the racecourse is illuminated with
beautiful lights.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokyo Mega Illumi is a special winter event held
at Oi Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Looking at all these lights really makes me think... This is what urban feng shui is all about.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. The area around the racecourse is usually
pretty basic looking, but...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The organizers wanted to invite more activity to
the area, and make it more fun at nighttime, so
they came up with the ideas of night races and
illuminations.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: So many emotions went into realizing all this.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It's an expression of human action! Every single
light here has meaning...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the middle of her urban feng shui explanation,
Copano Rickey suddenly falls silent.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer. Isn't this kinda boring?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
We came here to have fun, but I'm just lecturing
you about feng shui. I mean, I can do that any
time.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: So today... let's drop the feng shui.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Nope! I'm sealing away all my knowledge of
fortunes and direction reading. So my head's
going to be totally free of all that while we hang
out. Is that okay?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Great! ☆ So, let's just do whatever we feel like
today. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe it's down to the string of stressful races
she's had recently, but Copano Rickey seems to
want to let loose.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
First up is dinner! ☆ Leave the ordering to me—I'll
get us something really fancy!

text_block_list.name: Server
text_block_list.text:
Um... I don't believe this is all going to fit onto
the table...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Really? The special plates are this big? Whoops! I ordered one of each.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The scenery's really nice around here. Let's go for
a little walk, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: It's like I'm in a land of dreams...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rattle, rattle! CRASH!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Eek! Huhhh? What's a mop and bucket doing
here?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Geeez... If only I'd been channeling feng shui, this
would never have happened.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?
choice_data_list: Without feng shui... are you just a klutz?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Of course not! There's no way...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I definitely have what it takes to make the
holidays special!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Follow me, Trainer! It's time for my comeba—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whack!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: OwwwWWW?! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Various calamities continue to befall Rickey over
the course of our fun holiday outing. By the end
of it, I feel like I've glimpsed a side of her that's
been hidden until now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Various calamities continue to befall Rickey.
Throughout the evening, she keeps showing me a
side of herself that's been hidden away beneath
all her feng shui.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Then, on the way home...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, Trainer. Look at that precious stone
they're selling over there...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It's a lapis lazuli from Central Asia. It's got sooo
much dormant energy inside. I wonder what it's
doing here...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Is this all just a coincidence? There's just so much
joyful energy radiating from the stone, though.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look at the price tag. The stone is by no means
cheap.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I trust what Copano Rickey said, so it must be
worth the price. In that case...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
What? You're buying me something this
precious?!
choice_data_list: Just think of it as a little holiday present.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: C'mon, it's not "little" at all... It's super rare. Plus...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
This power of fortune within the stone—if I misuse
it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Of that I'm absolutely sure. No matter how much
power she finds herself in possession of...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Copano Rickey will use it in the right way and make everyone happy. However incredible the power might be, I know she can be trusted with it.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
You really do believe in me, don't you? In that
case...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'll accept your present. And...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I won't hog all the luck you've given me. I'll share
the happiness with everyone! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey raises her wrapped present high
above her head...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Go forth, qi! Bring your blessings unto everyone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe it's my imagination, but for just a moment
the night sky seems to fill with stars...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey's heartfelt desire to make
everyone happy really has spread across the
world tonight.
